# TeachWatch Project Guidelines

## Scope
- These instructions apply to all coding tasks in this repository.
- Prefer small, focused changes that preserve existing behavior unless a behavior change is requested.

## Implementation Defaults
- Keep code easy to read and maintain.
- Follow existing naming and folder conventions before introducing new patterns.
- Avoid broad refactors unless they are necessary for the requested task.

## Validation
- Run the smallest relevant checks for the change when possible.
- If you cannot run checks, state what was not validated.

## Safety
- Do not run destructive commands unless explicitly requested.
- Call out assumptions and potential risks when requirements are ambiguous.

## Delivery
- Summarize what changed, why it changed, and how it was validated.
- Include clear next steps only when they are useful.
